location: Sold by the Isolated Merchant at his shack (Isolated Merchant's Shack, Dragonbarrow) in the northwest of Dragonbarrow, overlooking the Great-Jar, for 1,200 Runes. It is a merchant purchase, not a field pickup or drop.
tactics: Dragonbarrow is a high-level sub-area north of central Caelid guarded by dragons and tough patrols — stick to the roads or use Torrent to avoid unnecessary fights on the way to the shack
The shack has its own Site of Grace, so once found you can fast-travel straight back to restock
Equip it in either hand (or on your back while two-handing another weapon) to stop wolves, dogs, boars, bears, rats and basilisks from attacking first
It does not pacify everything — Runebears, Stormhawks and Warhawks ignore it, so don't assume total safety around every beast
lore: Soaked in a specially prepared incense oil rather than plain fuel, this torch's scent calms wild animals instead of scaring them off — a trick once used by those guarding treasure hidden in beast-infested caves.

builds.name: Strength off-hand utility
builds.why: Strength is its primary scaling stat, and its main value is the beast-pacifying passive for exploring animal-heavy caves and catacombs without picking unnecessary fights.

builds.name: Exploration / low-combat runs
builds.why: Letting wolves, boars, dogs and bears ignore you enables faster, safer routes through beast-thick overworld areas, useful for min-combat or low-level playthroughs.
